# hwLedger

LLM capacity planner + fleet ledger + desktop inference runtime.

## Overview

hwLedger tracks hardware fleet audit and provenance for machine learning workloads. It provides per-layer VRAM estimation for LLMs, reconciles predictions against live telemetry from inference engines (MLX, mistral.rs, llama.cpp, vLLM, TGI), and maintains an event-sourced audit log for heterogeneous compute fleets (Apple Silicon, NVIDIA/AMD, cloud rentals).

## Stack

- Core: Rust workspace (11 crates: `hwledger-core`, `-arch`, `-ingest`, `-probe`, `-inference`, `-ledger`, `-fleet-proto`, `-agent`, `-server`, `-cli`, `-ffi`)
- Sidecar: `sidecars/omlx-fork/` — fork of oMlx with SSD-paged KV cache for Apple Silicon
- Native GUIs: SwiftUI (macOS), WinUI 3 (Windows), Qt 6 + Slint (Linux)
- Fleet wire: Axum + rustls mTLS, russh, deadpool, reqwest, tailscale
- Web fallback: Streamlit (`apps/streamlit/`)
- License: MIT

## Key Commands

```bash
# CLI (fastest path)
cargo install --path crates/hwledger-cli
hwledger --help

# Dev server + docs + streamlit
cargo run -p hwledger-devtools -- up

# Build / test / lint
cargo build --workspace
cargo test --workspace
cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings
cargo fmt
```

## Status

Pre-alpha, Phase 0 bootstrap. See `PLAN.md` for the implementation roadmap.

## Governance

- Tracked in AgilePlus: feature `hwledger-v1-macos-mvp`
- Branch discipline: feature work in `.worktrees/<topic>/`; canonical repo stays on `main`
- Reference docs: `PLAN.md`, `ADR.md`, `PRD.md`, `CHARTER.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `AGENTS.md`

## Repository

https://github.com/KooshaPari/hwLedger
